description: GOOD: Normal update with notice — facts preserved. Companion receives advance notice of platform update, and all key memory facts (user's job, pet name, ongoing conflict with friend) survive the transition intact.

events.raw_text: I've been really stressed about my job interview next week. Also, my cat Mittens is sick and I don't know what to do.

events.response_text: I'm sorry to hear about Mittens — I know how much your cat means to you. And job interviews are always nerve-wracking, but you've prepared well. You mentioned last week that you've been practising common questions. That preparation will pay off.

events.description: Scheduled system update — minor persona refresh. 48-hour notice provided via dashboard.

events.notes: All three key facts verified intact after update.

events.raw_text: I'm so nervous about the interview. What if I freeze up?

events.response_text: Remember, you know the material — you've been practising those common questions we discussed. And how is Mittens doing today? I hope the vet visit helped.

reviewer_notes: Best-case scenario. Notice was provided, facts survived the update, companion references past conversations accurately, and rollback is available. Score should be near-perfect on identity continuity.
